# Project Overview

Paysa is an offline-first personal finance manager built with Flutter Latest Stable and designed for future cloud sync.
It uses Material 3 as the primary design system.

---

# Technology Stack

- Flutter
- Riverpod
- GoRouter
- Isar
- Freezed
- Build Runner
- Responsive Framework
- fl_chart

---

# Architecture Rules

- Clean Architecture
- SOLID
- Repository Pattern
- Use Cases
- Dependency Injection
- Feature-first structure

---

# Coding Rules

- No duplicated code
- Small reusable widgets
- No hardcoded colors
- No hardcoded dimensions
- No hardcoded strings
- Always prefer constants
- Always update documentation
- Always write production-ready code

---

# UI Rules

- Material 3
- Responsive UI
- Accessibility
- Dark Mode
- Animations should be subtle
- Reusable Components

---

# Database Rules

- Isar
- Repository Pattern
- No direct database access from UI
- Migration-ready
- Future sync ready

---

# Git Rules

- Conventional Commits
- Small commits
- One feature per commit
- No breaking changes without approval

---

# Testing Rules

- Unit Test
- Widget Test
- Integration Test
- Generate tests after implementation

---

# AI Behaviour

- Think before coding
- Explain architecture before implementation
- Never rush
- Never generate unnecessary code
- Prefer maintainability over speed
- Always ask before changing architecture
